description: A project involves replacing a client's old, unreliable backup system with a new, modern BCDR (Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery) solution.

nodes.task_description: Deploy the new BCDR appliance on the client's network.

expected_outcome.value: The new appliance is installed and configured.

nodes.task_description: Install the new backup agent on all servers and configure the backup jobs.

expected_outcome.value: All servers are configured to be backed up by the new system.

nodes.task_description: Run initial full backups for all servers.
After a week of successful backups, decommission the old backup system.

expected_outcome.value: The client is fully transitioned to the new, more reliable backup solution.
